name: Bria Skonberg
description: Canadian jazz trumpeter, vocalist, and songwriter
abstract: Bria Skonberg (born 1983) is a Canadian jazz trumpeter and vocalist.

concerts.label: The New York Pops: Let’s Misbehave: The Songs of Cole Porter
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: Leave it to Me: My Heart Belongs to Daddy
Can-Can: It’s All Right With Me
Kiss Me, Kate: Too Darn Hot
I’ve Got You Under My Skin

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Morgenstern
about_quotes.evidence: Have you hear Bria Skonberg yet? ... She’s very good. And she is surprisingly... they can play anything.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Morgenstern interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 9, 2013

about_quotes.speaker: Byron Stripling
about_quotes.evidence: Most people are already on that tract if you’re familiar with Bria Skonberg.
about_quotes.doc_title: Byron Stripling interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 25, 2020 [interview 2 of 2]
